assertions.description: navigator.gpu is exposed when WebGPU is supported.
navigator.gpu.requestAdapter returns a Promise (entry to limits introspection).
After an adapter is acquired, adapter.limits does not list maxInterStageShaderComponents.
assertions.test: (async()=>{if(!('gpu' in navigator))return true;const a=await navigator.gpu.requestAdapter();if(!a)return true;return !('maxInterStageShaderComponents' in a.limits);})()

assertions.description: adapter.limits exposes maxInterStageShaderVariables — the replacement limit.
assertions.test: (async()=>{if(!('gpu' in navigator))return true;const a=await navigator.gpu.requestAdapter();if(!a)return true;return 'maxInterStageShaderVariables' in a.limits;})()

assertions.description: GPUAdapterInfo is exposed — adjacent surface used to introspect limits/capabilities.
